name: Copthorne Hotel Rotorua
description: 位于独特的地热仙境之中，距市中心仅短途距离。临近波利尼西亚温泉、罗托鲁瓦湖和蒂普亚毛利文化村（波胡图间歇泉所在地）。酒店休闲设施包括2个室外温泉池和室外恒温泳池。餐厅供应丰盛的单点早餐，酒吧每日晚间开放。
descriptionEn: Situated in a unique geothermal wonderland, a short distance from the city centre. Close to Polynesian Spa, Lake Rotorua, and Te Puia (home of Pohutu Geyser). Leisure facilities include 2 outdoor spa pools and an outdoor heated pool. Restaurant serves a hearty a la carte breakfast and bar is open every evening.
highlights: 地热仙境中的绝佳位置
临近蒂普亚和波胡图间歇泉
